vulnerability.reason: Generated describes pipeline deficiency, missing reference's viewer low-tolerance sensitivity.
vulnerability.reference: Viewers' low tolerance for uncanny jitter in avatars, lowering perceived creator credibility and content trustworthiness.
vulnerability.generated: Automated generation pipelines lack real-time jitter detection, forcing creators to rely on flawed motion outputs without manual correction.

impact.reason: Viewer disengagement and lost monetization cover both affected parties and damage type.
impact.reference: Loss of viewer engagement and creator monetization, potentially driving users to alternative platforms.
impact.generated: Viewer disengagement and lost monetization as visually jittery avatars undermine content quality and creator credibility.

dose_response.reason: Generated arc inserts pipeline detection failure, omitting trust erosion and altering causal mechanism.
dose_response.reference: Quantization errors cause visual jitter in avatar motions, exposing content creators and viewers to low-quality content that erodes trust, leading to loss of engagement and monetization.
dose_response.generated: Quantization errors in motion tokenization degrading physical plausibility and semantic consistency, through creators and viewers facing low-quality avatar motions, triggers automated generation pipelines lacking real-time jitter detection, forcing reliance on flawed outputs, leading to viewer disengagement and lost monetization.
